backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for NexNam with CRUD operations for projects, services, contacts, and founder info, plus simple password-based admin authentication.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—the React admin panel and the dynamic public-facing sections—to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the NexNam React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, routes between the public site and the protected admin panel based on the URL path, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Animated About section displaying mission/vision/values cards, a company timeline, and animated stat counters using custom hooks for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactSub: Admin panel card that fetches and displays all contact form submissions sorted by timestamp, showing sender name, email, message, and formatted date.
frontend/src/components/admin/FounderEdi: Admin form card for viewing and updating the founder's name, title, bio, and photo URL, using react-hook-form and the `useUpdateFounder` mutation with success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProjectsMa: Admin CRUD interface for managing portfolio projects, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with inline form toggling, confirmation prompts, and transient success messages.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin UI component for managing services (add, edit, delete) with form handling via react-hook-form and mutation hooks, displaying a list of services with success/confirmation feedback.
frontend/src/components/CTASection.tsx: Contact section with static contact info cards and a form that submits to the backend via the useSubmitContact mutation, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, smooth-scroll navigation links, social media icon buttons, and a Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero3DBackground: Renders an animated Three.js Canvas background featuring two rotating wireframe icosahedra and two particle systems using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Displays the full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, headline, tagline, and two CTA buttons linking to Services and Contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware blur/background effect, smooth-scroll desktop links, a 'Start Project' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSection: Fetches and displays portfolio projects in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, empty-state fallback, and project cards showing image, category badge, title, description, and results.
frontend/src/components/ProcessSection.t: Renders a five-step process section (Discover, Design, Develop, Launch, Scale) with scroll-driven animated connector line and fade-in-on-scroll step cards.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Guards child routes by checking authentication state; redirects unauthenticated users to the AdminLogin page.
Fetches and renders service offerings in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback, displaying each service's icon, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/TeamSection.tsx: Displays the founder's profile (photo, name, title, bio) fetched via `useFounderQuery`, with skeleton loading states and a fallback message if no data is available.
frontend/src/components/TechnologySectio: Renders an animated tech-stack section with a grid of technology badges (React, Node.js, AWS, etc.) that float and glow on hover, using an intersection-observer-based animation helper.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Shows a looping auto-scrolling Embla carousel of client testimonials with star ratings, result highlights, and previous/next navigation controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook for admin password-based authentication that calls the backend actor's authenticate method and persists auth state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a number counting up to a target value using an eased animation, triggered once when the element enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track whether a referenced DOM element is visible in the viewport, with optional one-time trigger support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (founder, projects, services, contacts) using the ICP actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties along with utility classes for gradients and glass effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar navigation that switches between four management sections: Founder, Projects, Services, and Contacts. Includes logout functionality and a mobile-responsive overlay sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a password input form that calls the useAuth hook's login method. Displays loading state and error alerts, with a link back to the main site.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration using oklch-based CSS variable color tokens, custom Inter/Syne font families, and accordion/fade/slide keyframe animations. Includes the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a NexNam Portfolio site on Internet Computer (Motoko backend) with existing features for an admin panel and live content fetching, plus pending requests for backend actor setup and integrated admin management.
